title: Two-way project sync
summary: A local file becomes the shared contract between an editing agent and the visual graph.

steps.title: Choose a local flow file
steps.detail: Enter an absolute or project-relative JSON path in the File dialog.

steps.title: Read JSON through the app
steps.detail: A local Next API route reads the file and returns its contents and modified time.

steps.title: Render the graph
steps.detail: The existing parser validates the file and the graph model becomes the canvas state.

steps.title: Watch for external edits
steps.detail: The browser polls the file timestamp and reloads when another agent updates it.

steps.title: Edit visually
steps.detail: Move tiles, rename actors, adjust groups, or change edge labels directly in the app.

steps.title: Write changes back
steps.detail: After a short quiet period, the visualized document is serialized back to the same path.

loops.label: another agent can keep editing the same file
